mapper.select: SELECT member_group_idx, site_id, member_group_name, parent_member_group_idx, member_group_depth, remark, print_seq, default_group_yn, admin_yn, admin_group_yn, user_group_yn, guest_group_yn FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx}

SELECT member_group_idx, site_id, member_group_name, parent_member_group_idx, member_group_depth, remark, print_seq, default_group_yn, admin_yn, admin_group_yn, user_group_yn, guest_group_yn FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND default_group_yn = 'Y' AND user_group_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO WB_MEMBER_GROUP ( member_group_idx, site_id, member_group_name, parent_member_group_idx, member_group_depth, remark, print_seq, default_group_yn, add_dttm, add_id, mod_dttm, mod_id ) VALUES ( WB_MEMBER_GROUP_IDX_SEQ.NEXTVAL,
'CMS',
(SELECT site_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE member_group_idx = #{parent_member_group_idx}),
#{member_group_name}, #{parent_member_group_idx}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(member_group_depth),0)+1 FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE member_group_idx = #{parent_member_group_idx}), #{remark}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(print_seq),0)+1 FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE parent_member_group_idx = #{parent_member_group_idx}), 'N', SYSDATE, #{cud_id}, SYSDATE, #{cud_id} )
mapper.update: UPDATE WB_MEMBER_GROUP SET member_group_name = #{member_group_name}, remark = #{remark} WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} AND default_group_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE parent_member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} AND default_group_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT relation_member_group_idx FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_RELATION WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx}

SELECT member_group_idx, site_id, member_group_name, parent_member_group_idx, remark, print_seq, default_group_yn, admin_yn, admin_group_yn, user_group_yn, guest_group_yn FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND user_group_yn = 'Y'
